ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's team */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the league */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's agent */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle for the team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's profile image */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the coach */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any coaching certifications held by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game's referee */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the stats are from */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stats belong to */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "points3" INTEGER /* Points scored from three-point shots */,
  "points2" INTEGER /* Points scored from two-point shots */,
  "points1" INTEGER /* Points scored from free throws */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shot percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player receiving the salary */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the salary is applicable */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Amount of salary for that season */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "performance_bonus" INTEGER /* Whether the player has a performance bonus */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Amount of the performance bonus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated team */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the team's arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the team's location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the team's location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the team's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the team's office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team's office */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's social media page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user's account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
